TestCase z46Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_data2 = (double*)malloc(t1.n2 * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_data2, t1.data2, t1.n2 * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.data2 = follow_case_data2;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element to reverse
    if (follow_case.n2 < 1) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Reverse the entire array data2
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n2 / 2; ++i) {
        double tmp = follow_case.data2[i];
        follow_case.data2[i] = follow_case.data2[follow_case.n2 - 1 - i];
        follow_case.data2[follow_case.n2 - 1 - i] = tmp;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
